title: Ceva Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ceva Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!
